Term of the day

Stillbirth (ولادة جنين ميت):

Birth of a baby showing no signs of life. [Source: World Health Organization. Regional Office for Europe. (‎2000)‎. Definitions and indicators in Family Planning Maternal & Child Health and Reproductive Health]
